# Taxes in company currency in invoice report

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:a504264baf1f755633f3b1523ff36017147f05b4f02bbcf4f3f564d25427d2c5
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds tax-related amounts in the company's currency when printing invoices.

In some countries, this is a requirement for certain transactions.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

The amounts will appear on the printed invoice when the currency of the invoice is different from the company's currency.

In the following example, we have a company whose currency is \$, and has created a sales invoice in €. In the tax calculation, the taxes are shown in the € currency of the printed invoice and in brackets in the company's currency \$.

:::{figure} https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCA/account-invoicing/16.0/account_invoice_currency_taxes/static/description/out_invoice.png
:::
